user_system_path: Owner-directed LANDING seam (#500): import + implement the Claude-Design 'Foldera Landing' (dark cyan/magenta presence-layer redesign) on the public landing page. Temporary authorized detour off the active Scout seam (#494), mirroring the prior landing pass (#496). The landing is the first user-facing surface; this pass replaces the marketing landing with the imported design while keeping the real auth/route wiring (/start, /login, /demo) and the isAuthenticated contract intact.
allowed_files_raw: LANDING seam #500: the imported Foldera Landing design lands in components/foldera/** (LandingPage), rendered by app/page.tsx; Space Grotesk display font added in app/layout.js; design CSS embedded in the landing component (or app/globals.css) scoped so the dashboard palette is untouched; real connector logos + brand mark from public/**; coupled landing e2e specs refreshed under tests/**. Control-plane + Bible governance edits permitted.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard changes, no API/Scout/Stripe/schema/secrets. Landing is marketing-only and must keep real auth/route wiring (no dead anchors) and no forbidden public-facing claim terms.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
required_browser_proof: The three coupled landing e2e specs (tests/e2e/landing-*.spec.ts) green in CI (sandbox has no Playwright browsers). Live visual validation owner-side across mobile/tablet/desktop. Absent CI/owner browser proof the visual claim is BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT.
acceptance_condition: Imported design lands on the public landing; gate:continuity + typecheck + lint(0) + build green; landing e2e specs refreshed to the new structure and green in CI; real CTA wiring preserved (/start, /login, /demo) with no dead anchors; no forbidden public-facing claim terms; dashboard palette untouched.
anti_regression_checks: no forbidden public-facing claim terms in app/components/public
primary CTAs route to /start; Sign in routes to /login
no horizontal overflow at 390px on the landing
stop_condition: Landing redesign lands as a draft PR on claude/landing-page-auth-01b7vj targeting #500; gate:continuity + typecheck + lint + build green; landing e2e specs refreshed (CI-gated browser proof). After merge, repoint control plane back to the Scout seam #494.
next_command: Owner: review the landing PR visually (mobile/tablet/desktop). After merge, repoint source truth back from #500 to #494 and resume the owner-gated Scout activation.
